headline: Citi Raises Ecolab (ECL) Price Target, Names it Top Specialty Chemicals Pick Ahead of Q2 Earnings
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is included among the 10 Dividend Stocks With Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential. On June 24, Citi raised its price recommendation on Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) to $330 from $325. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm also placed Ecolab on an “upside 90-day catalyst watch,” calling it […]
